allow:
Bash(~/.ssh/config << 'EOF'

Host github.com
    Hostname ssh.github.com
    Port 443
    User git
EOF)

Bash(~/.ssh/config << 'EOF'
Host github.com
    Hostname github.com
    Port 22
    User git
EOF)

Bash(~/.ssh/config << 'EOF'
# GitHub 配置 - 尝试多种方式

# 标准配置（端口 22）
Host github.com
    Hostname github.com
    Port 22
    User git
    ServerAliveInterval 60
    ServerAliveCountMax 3

# 备用配置（端口 443）
Host github-ssh.github.com
    Hostname ssh.github.com
    Port 443
    User git
    ServerAliveInterval 60
    ServerAliveCountMax 3
EOF)

Bash(~/.ssh/config << 'EOF'
Host github.com
    Hostname ssh.github.com
    Port 443
    User git
EOF)

Bash(# 增加 SSH 超时时间和保活设置
cat > ~/.ssh/config << 'EOF'
Host github.com
    Hostname ssh.github.com
    Port 443
    User git
    ServerAliveInterval 30
    ServerAliveCountMax 6
    ConnectTimeout 60
EOF
echo ""SSH 配置已优化"")
